summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Habit Reset tracker app. All backend APIs (15/15) and frontend features working perfectly. Authentication, urge tracking, progress analytics, motivation wall, and settings all functional.
passed_tests: Backend: All 15 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Auth: Email/password registration and login
Auth: Session management with cookies
Auth: Google OAuth button present and clickable
Auth: Logout flow redirects correctly
Dashboard: Stats display (streak, urges resisted, resist rate, best streak)
Dashboard: 'I'm having an urge' button navigates to urge timer
Dashboard: Quick action buttons (Breathing, Grounding, Progress, Motivation) navigate correctly
Urge Timer: Timer duration selection (5/10/15 min)
Urge Timer: Trigger and emotion dropdown selection
Urge Timer: Intensity level selection (1-10)
Urge Timer: Notes input field
Urge Timer: Timer start and countdown functionality
Urge Timer: Tab navigation (Timer, Breathing, Grounding, Coping)
Urge Timer: Breathing animation and instructions
Urge Timer: 5-4-3-2-1 grounding exercise steps
Urge Timer: Coping suggestions display
Urge Timer: 'I Resisted' and 'I Slipped' outcome buttons
Progress: Weekly/monthly chart tab switching
Progress: Trigger analytics and peak times display
Progress: Recent urges list with status indicators
Motivation Wall: Add new motivation message dialog
Motivation Wall: Category selection and filtering
Motivation Wall: Message display with categories
Settings: Profile information display
Settings: Reminder toggle and time settings
Settings: Day selection for reminders
Settings: Log a Slip (relapse) dialog functionality
Settings: Relapse trigger/emotion selection
Sidebar: Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Urge Timer, Progress, Motivation, Settings)
